about.title: About MyTestType
about.p1: MyTestType is a global entertainment platform offering a wide range of personality tests and engaging psychological content. Users can explore their character, psychological type, and life patterns through reports that combine modern algorithms with traditional analytical data.
about.p3: All content on MyTestType is created to provide self-exploration and enjoyable experiences. Our goal is to build a digital environment where users can understand themselves in a more interesting way and share their results with friends.
tests: MBTI Personality Test / Attachment Style Test
Intuition vs Logic Test / Hyperfixation Test
about.disclaimer: All fortune-telling, spiritual reading, and psychological test content provided on this site is for entertainment purposes only.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.p1: MyTestType places the highest priority on protecting user privacy.
privacy.item1: Items collected: Date of birth, time of birth, gender, country
privacy.item2: Purpose: Generating personalized reports and statistical analysis
privacy.paddleText: This service is operated as an independent personal project. We do not directly collect or store any payment information. The service is sustained through voluntary tips and offerings from users.
thirdPartyItems: MyTestType does not sell or share user personal information with third parties.
This site serves ads through Google AdSense. Users can disable personalized ads from the Google Ads Settings page.
privacy.p8Pre: For inquiries, please reach out via our

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.p1: For any inquiries related to MyTestType services, please send us an email. We will get back to you as soon as possible.

ui.heading: Who will read your destiny?
ui.subtext:
Each spirit reader has a different voice and interpretation.
Choose the one that calls to your heart.
ui.footerNote: Life Turning Point · Love Fortune · Wealth Fortune · Path to Success
ui.formTitle: Tell me your date of birth
ui.formSubtitle: The more accurate, the deeper the reading
ui.turningSubtext: Your life's flow changes around this age
ui.shareText: I got my K-Shaman fortune reading 🔮 Find out yours too!

baby_bosal.summary: Hmm~ looking at your flow, you're definitely a {{flow}} type! I can see something big shifting around age {{ta}}. Before then, things might feel stuck... but there's a reason for it, I promise.
baby_bosal.inborn: Here's the thing about you~ once your energy door opens, you just keep on rising! Sure, you might've had some tough patches early on, but all of that becomes your greatest strength later. Even if it's hard right now, hang in there~
baby_bosal.turning: Your life really changes around age {{ta}}, for real! It's not just a vague feeling — around then, something big shifts: your job, relationships, or even where you live. Don't be scared. Ride that wave!
baby_bosal.success: After age {{sa}}, things start falling into place in society~ Recognition starts coming in, and so does financial stability. When that moment arrives, all the hardship before will finally make sense.
baby_bosal.love: For love~ your energy comes in STRONG around ages {{la0}}, {{la1}}, and {{la2}}! The people you meet around these times could be seriously meaningful. Don't you dare let them pass you by!
baby_bosal.wealth: Financial fortune gradually stabilizes from age {{ws}} to {{we}}~ Instead of trying to make it big all at once, it's best to build steadily. Don't rush it~
baby_bosal.warning: Around ages {{wa0}} and {{wa1}}, please be a little careful! If you rush decisions or act on emotion during these times, you might regret it. Just pause for a moment and think it over. I'm rooting for you!

sunnyeo_bosal.summary: Your fortune flows gently... you carry the destiny of a {{flow}} path. Around age {{ta}}, I sense the currents of your life opening up beautifully in a new direction.
sunnyeo_bosal.inborn: You were born with an energy that, once your fortune's gate opens, flows endlessly without ceasing. Even if the path ahead seems unclear right now, know that good energy continues to surround you. Please, do not rush.
sunnyeo_bosal.turning: Around age {{ta}}, the energy of your life begins to flow anew. New connections and opportunities will naturally find their way to you during this time. Simply open your heart... and receive them.
sunnyeo_bosal.success: After age {{sa}}, the fruits of your long effort begin to ripen. The work you have quietly built up over time will finally shine in the light. Trust deeply in the process you are walking right now.
sunnyeo_bosal.love: The energy of love flows powerfully around ages {{la0}}, {{la1}}, and {{la2}}. The souls you encounter during these times are not mere coincidences — they may be deep, destined connections. Keep your heart open.
sunnyeo_bosal.wealth: The flow of wealth slowly and gracefully stabilizes from age {{ws}} to {{we}}. If you approach each small blessing with gratitude and sincerity... abundant energy will naturally follow.
sunnyeo_bosal.warning: Around ages {{wa0}} and {{wa1}}, please exercise great care in your decisions and relationships. Do not rush. First quiet your heart, then choose. These are periods that require wisdom to pass through gracefully.

chunshin_doryeong.summary: {{flow}} — that's you. Age {{ta}} is your turning point. Prepare yourself before that moment arrives. That's where your path divides.
chunshin_doryeong.inborn: Your innate energy is strong. Once your flow opens, nothing stops it. But you tend to carry everything alone — put some of that down.
chunshin_doryeong.turning: Age {{ta}}. This is the turning point. You need to lock in your direction right here. Don't waver. Miss this window, and the next opportunity is a long way off.
chunshin_doryeong.success: Achievement starts arriving at age {{sa}}. Everything you've built before shows results then. Don't let your guard down here. Keep pushing.
chunshin_doryeong.love: Love energy hits hard at ages {{la0}}, {{la1}}, and {{la2}}. When the opportunity comes during those times — don't hesitate. Just go. Overthinking means losing everything.
chunshin_doryeong.wealth: Wealth fortune opens from age {{ws}} to {{we}}. During this window, make decisive moves — investment, business, something. But absolutely no gambling. Build it clean.
chunshin_doryeong.warning: Ages {{wa0}} and {{wa1}} — watch out. Reckless judgment here means deep regret. Stay sharp in these periods and you can seize what comes next.

musog_in.summary: Looking at your life flow — you're a {{flow}} type. Around age {{ta}}, your fortune starts to wake up. Before that, there may be some blockages.
musog_in.inborn: Looking at your innate energy, your willpower is strong. You don't give up easily, you keep going steadily — and that's your biggest weapon.
musog_in.turning: Around age {{ta}}, your fortune makes a big shift. The flow changes after this period — don't be afraid of that change. You need to embrace it.
musog_in.success: After age {{sa}}, I see a flow of social stability and achievement coming in. Prepare well for this period and things will open up even wider.
musog_in.love: Looking at your love flow — strong connections come in around ages {{la0}}, {{la1}}, and {{la2}}. Don't overlook the people you meet during these times.
musog_in.wealth: Financial flow gradually stabilizes from age {{ws}} to {{we}}. Don't let greed take over during this period — that would scatter everything you've built.
musog_in.warning: Around ages {{wa0}} and {{wa1}}, be careful with your judgment. When making decisions during these times, think twice, three times, and listen to the people around you.

beopsa.summary: You carry the destiny of a {{flow}} path. Around age {{ta}}, a significant turning point arrives in the flow of your life. Prepare yourself well for this time.
beopsa.inborn: Within you is a quiet, unshakeable strength. Though it may not be visible on the surface, you were born with an energy that always finds its center, no matter how great the difficulty.
beopsa.turning: Around age {{ta}}, the direction of your life will be determined. Do not rush. Think deeply, and choose with great care.
beopsa.success: After age {{sa}}, the fruits of long effort begin to become visible. Remember — the achievements of this time are not born from greed, but are the reward for your sincerity.
beopsa.love: The connections of love will arrive around ages {{la0}}, {{la1}}, and {{la2}}. Do not try to force them. Simply follow the heart that opens naturally during those times.
beopsa.wealth: From age {{ws}} to {{we}}, wealth stabilizes. To one who abandons greed and works with honesty, wealth will always return. Do not spend this period carelessly.
beopsa.warning: Around ages {{wa0}} and {{wa1}}, you must exercise caution. Do not rush your judgment. For any important decision, give it time and reflect deeply.

What's Your Pet's
Personality Type?
home.subtitle:
Discover your pet's hidden nature!
Dog: 15 questions · Cat: 15 questions

result.heading: {{label}} Test Result
result.saveError:
Image save failed 😢
Try taking a screenshot instead!

q1.text: When meeting another dog for the first time at the park?
q1.a0: Rush over tail-up and greet them first
q1.a1: Excitedly approach but glance back at my owner
q1.a2: Hide behind my owner and just peek my nose out
q1.a3: Pretend not to care and sniff around on my own

q2.text: When a stranger visits the house?
q2.a0: Run over, jump up, and lick them right away
q2.a1: Bark a bit then quickly go say hello
q2.a2: Watch for a while, then slowly approach after sniffing
q2.a3: Stay in the corner and keep my guard up

q3.text: When my owner comes home after a long time away?
q3.a0: Bark and run around welcoming them with my whole body
q3.a1: Wag my tail big and jump up to greet them
q3.a2: Quietly approach and gently wag my tail
q3.a3: Lift my head from where I was sleeping and greet with my eyes

q4.text: How do I behave at a dog park?
q4.a0: Run to every dog and ask them to play
q4.a1: Pick a friend I like and play with them intensely
q4.a2: Stay near my owner and only join in occasionally
q4.a3: Explore alone in the corner, enjoying all the new smells

q5.text: When a new path appears during a walk?
q5.a0: Go in without hesitation — zero fear
q5.a1: Sniff cautiously and slowly move forward
q5.a2: Take a quick look then return to the familiar path
q5.a3: Won't go unless my owner goes first

q6.text: When I get a new toy for the first time?
q6.a0: Chew it up and take it apart to figure it out
q6.a1: Roll it around and try different ways to use it
q6.a2: Play with it the usual way — fetch and carry
q6.a3: I prefer my old toys and barely look at the new one

q7.text: Mealtime! What is my eating style?
q7.a0: Sniff carefully and eat selectively, checking twice
q7.a1: Chew slowly and savor each bite
q7.a2: Eat as fast as possible the moment it appears
q7.a3: Pick out specific ingredients and only eat favorites

q8.text: When I spot a small creature in the bushes?
q8.a0: Strategically surround it and try to catch it
q8.a1: Curiously poke at it with my nose to investigate
q8.a2: Carefully sniff and then move away
q8.a3: No interest — just keep doing what I was doing

q9.a0: Immediately run over, lick them, and climb on them
q9.a1: Quietly lie beside them and share warmth
q9.a2: Bring a toy to cheer them up
q9.a3: Not sure — I just act normally

q10.text: During training, when I make a mistake?
q10.a0: Keep trying even after being scolded until I get it
q10.a1: Give up quickly and look for an easier way
q10.a2: Watch my owner nervously and feel deflated
q10.a3: Feel very upset and sulk for a long time

q11.text: When another dog takes my toy?
q11.a0: Go get it right back — no negotiation
q11.a1: Try to persuade them and propose a swap
q11.a2: Sad, but give up and find something else
q11.a3: Run to my owner to complain

q12.text: When playtime with my owner ends?
q12.a0: A little sad, but I accept it calmly
q12.a1: Bring the toy back asking for more
q12.a2: Wander around my owner giving puppy eyes
q12.a3: Very upset — I stick right to their side

istj.title: The Principled Pupper
istj.summary: The icon of routine and trust
istj.description: A top-of-the-class type who remembers walk times precisely and feels most at ease following set rules. Prefers familiar routines over sudden changes.
istj.compatibleOwner: A calm owner who keeps a regular daily schedule
istj.ownerTip: Keep meal and walk times consistent. A steady routine is your pup's greatest comfort!
istj.strength2: Deep loyalty and devotion to family
istj.caution0: Needs time to adapt to environmental changes
istj.caution1: Strong-willed; patience is key in training
istj.lifestyle: Loves a set walking routine and stable daily life. Walking the same route at the same time every day brings pure joy. Thrives with plenty of space to run freely.
istj.fullDescription: The ISTJ Siberian Husky is an exceptionally diligent and reliable companion. They thrive on established routines and never forget promises. Initially reserved, they offer unwavering loyalty once trust is built. Intelligent and independent, they are happiest running freely in open spaces.
istj.advantages: Strong responsibility means always completing assigned tasks. Predictable behavior makes them easy to live with and they excel at home protection.
istj.disadvantages: Slow to adapt to changes and guarded in unfamiliar environments. Very high energy can mean destructive behavior without enough exercise.
istj.activityTip: Needs at least 2 hours of vigorous daily exercise. Running, hiking, and free play in open spaces are ideal. Loves cold weather so enjoys winter outdoor activities especially.
istj.compatibility: Gets along best with ESFJ (Dachshund) and ENFJ (Golden Retriever). Makes the best partner with a warm, stable, and active guardian.

isfj.title: The Devoted Guardian
isfj.summary: The loyal bodyguard by your side
isfj.description: Quietly leans their head against you, carefully reading your mood. Incredibly devoted with a powerful instinct to protect the family.
isfj.compatibleOwner: A warm owner who treasures family time
isfj.ownerTip: Show your affection with plenty of cuddles. Family is this pup's whole world!
isfj.strength0: Warm heart that cares for family with great attention
isfj.strength1: Keen observation skills that notice even small details
isfj.caution0: Needs time to warm up to new people
isfj.caution1: Strong protective instinct may cause barking at strangers
isfj.lifestyle: Values time with family above everything. Stays close to family indoors, keeping track of everything. Feels most stable in a regular routine and familiar environment.
isfj.fullDescription: The ISFJ Schnauzer is a devoted companion ready to do anything for their family. Their fine sensitivity helps them quickly detect changes in their guardian's emotions and they draw closer on difficult days. They may appear tough on the outside but are full of warmth inside.
isfj.advantages: Always knows family routines and stays close at the right moments. Strong alertness to strangers makes them great watchdogs. Gets along well with other pets.
isfj.disadvantages: Overly protective nature means socialization training is important. Prone to separation anxiety if left alone for too long.
isfj.activityTip: About an hour of daily walks and indoor play is sufficient. Loves brain stimulation games and simple trick training. Regular and predictable exercise routine is best.
isfj.compatibility: Gets along well with ISTJ (Siberian Husky) and ESFJ (Dachshund). The ideal companion for guardians seeking a stable, warm home.

infj.title: The Insightful Advocate
infj.summary: Reads your heart without a word
infj.description: Radiates a mysterious aura as if lost in thought. Highly sensitive to your emotional shifts and values deep emotional bonds above all.
infj.compatibleOwner: A calm owner who appreciates quiet environments
infj.ownerTip: Avoid loud noises and sudden stimuli. A peaceful setting is where this pup thrives!
infj.strength0: Deep intuition to read guardian's feelings
infj.strength1: Strong bond and full devotion to one person
infj.strength2: Rare high intelligence and strong self-respect
infj.caution0: Once disappointed, trust is hard to rebuild
infj.caution1: Strong independence can make obedience training challenging
infj.lifestyle: Adapts best in quiet, peaceful environments. Desires deep connection with their guardian but also cherishes alone time. Particularly enjoys walks and exploration in nature.
infj.fullDescription: The INFJ Jindo is a breed with mysterious charm. They open their hearts only to a few family members and once trust is built, become a partner for life. Intuitively reading emotions, they offer silent comfort in difficult moments. With strong self-respect, they prefer relationships built on trust over forceful training.
infj.advantages: Has amazing homing instinct and loyalty. Can act independently and waits calmly even when guardians are busy. Clean and excellent at self-care.
infj.disadvantages: Very guarded around other dogs and strangers. More suitable for experienced guardians. Once they close their heart, it is hard to open again.
infj.activityTip: Loves hiking in nature and free exploration in open spaces. Scent games and intelligence training provide mental satisfaction. Positive reinforcement is more effective than forceful training.
infj.compatibility: Forms deep bonds with INTJ (Jack Russell) and INFP (Poodle). Builds the best relationship with quiet, respectful guardians.

intj.title: The Strategic Mastermind
intj.description: Prefers nose work and puzzle toys over simple repetition. Handles alone time well and is a quick-thinking smart partner.
intj.compatibleOwner: An owner who enjoys mental challenges and respects independence
intj.ownerTip: Offer puzzle toys and nose work games. This pup loves a good brain workout!
intj.strength0: High intelligence and quick learning ability
intj.strength1: Tenacity to achieve whatever goal is set
intj.caution0: Can be stubborn about doing things their own way
intj.caution1: Cannot tolerate boredom and may attempt to escape
intj.lifestyle: Enjoys endless exploration and challenging activities. Loves learning new things and may create their own problems without mental stimulation. Pursues what they want with intense focus.
intj.fullDescription: The INTJ Jack Russell Terrier carries the spirit of a bold strategist in a small body. They have the willpower to overcome any obstacle once a goal is set. While independent, they value trust with their guardian and quietly but sharply analyze situations. They may seem playful but are very calculated.
intj.advantages: Excellent problem-solving skills lead to outstanding results in agility, training, and sports. Naturally talented at energizing and entertaining their guardian.
intj.disadvantages: Can be difficult to train when stubborn. May show destructive behavior without sufficient activity. Strong prey drive means tendency to chase small animals.
intj.activityTip: Stimulate the mind with puzzle toys and nosework. Excels in dog sports like agility and flyball. Needs at least 1-2 hours of vigorous daily activity.
intj.compatibility: Great synergy with INFJ (Jindo) and ENTJ (German Shepherd). Forms the best team with goal-oriented, challenge-loving guardians.

istp.title: The Versatile Virtuoso
istp.description: Fearless when exploring new objects or leaping over obstacles. Prefers quietly staying by your side over over-the-top affection.
istp.compatibleOwner: An active owner who also respects personal space
istp.ownerTip: Expose them to varied environments. New stimuli bring out their best!
istp.strength1: Balance between independence and being there when needed
istp.strength2: Curious and eager to learn many different things
istp.caution0: Poor at expressing emotions; guardian may misunderstand
istp.caution1: Training participation drops when they lose interest
istp.lifestyle: Loves to observe and analyze. Plays enthusiastically when in the mood and enjoys quiet alone time when resting. Thoroughly explores new environments before getting comfortable.
istp.fullDescription: The ISTP Bichon Frisé appears cute and cheerful on the outside but hides a strong independence and sharp observation inside. They quietly survey surroundings and act precisely when needed. Though poor at expressing emotions, they show love in their own way and are happiest when given sufficient freedom.
istp.advantages: Calmly and coolly assesses situations. Adapts well to varied situations and learns quickly when interested. Hypoallergenic coat makes them suitable for allergy-prone households.
istp.disadvantages: May prefer independent time over emotional bonding, making guardians feel lonely. Tends to ignore training when not interested.
istp.activityTip: Regularly rotate toys and exploration activities. Enjoys agility and fetch play. About 30-60 minutes of daily walks is usually sufficient.
istp.compatibility: Actively gets along with ESTP (Labrador) and ENTP (Pomeranian). Compatible with guardians who respect personal space and independence.

isfp.title: The Curious Artist
isfp.summary: A pacifist curious about every smell
isfp.description: A free spirit who loves sniffing everything on walks. Dislikes conflict and gets along well with everyone.
isfp.compatibleOwner: An owner who enjoys leisurely walks and exploration
isfp.ownerTip: Don't rush them! Sniff-time is the most precious part of their walk.
isfp.strength1: Sensitive ability to sense the mood of surroundings
isfp.caution1: Strong pride means disliking being forced
isfp.lifestyle: Treasures personal space and alone time. Enjoys anywhere with their favorite guardian but gets stressed in crowded or noisy environments. Finds greatest joy in nature walks.
isfp.fullDescription: The ISFP Shiba Inu is a companion with strong individuality and a free spirit. Behind the quiet exterior lies rich sensitivity, shown only to those they trust. They have a complex inner world: independent yet disliking loneliness. Their special "Shiba smile" captivates everyone.
isfp.advantages: Independent, clean, and excellent at self-care. Easy to live with in calm environments. Has special charm captivating everyone with the "Shiba smile".
isfp.disadvantages: Strong pride can make obedience training a challenge. Needs socialization with other dogs. Strong prey drive means tendency to chase small animals.
isfp.activityTip: Enjoys 1-2 regular daily walks. Prefers exploring in natural settings over the city. Best to respect their pace without pushing too hard.
isfp.compatibility: Forms quiet, deep bonds with INFJ (Jindo) and ISFJ (Schnauzer). Best matched with calm guardians who respect personal space.

infp.title: The Passionate Mediator
infp.description: Incredibly soft-hearted, reacting strongly even to the tone of your voice. Imaginative with a vivid inner world of their own.
infp.compatibleOwner: An owner with a soft voice and warm energy
infp.ownerTip: Lead with praise, not scolding. Positive energy is the key to this sensitive heart!
infp.strength1: Remarkable creativity and outstanding learning ability
infp.strength2: Warm heart that deeply resonates with guardian's emotions
infp.caution0: Sensitive nature means stress from loud noises or rough environments
infp.caution1: Mood swings mean consistent love and attention are needed
infp.lifestyle: A dreamer with a rich emotional world. Desires deep emotional connection and treasures every moment together. Enjoys learning new things and expressing love in various ways.
infp.fullDescription: The INFP Poodle is an attractive companion with both intelligence and sensitivity. They sensitively sense their guardian's mood, celebrating joyfully and offering quiet comfort during sadness. They express love creatively and showcase amazing tricks. They carry deep idealism within.
infp.advantages: Very high intelligence means quick learning of complex commands. Hypoallergenic coat suitable for allergy-prone households. Gets along well with all ages.
infp.disadvantages: Emotionally sensitive and vulnerable to loneliness or stress. Coat requires significant time and money to maintain. Can suffer psychologically without consistent attention.
infp.activityTip: Enjoys various activities like swimming, agility, and obedience training. Gains mental satisfaction through brain games and new trick training. About 1-2 hours of daily activity is appropriate.
infp.compatibility: Forms deep emotional bonds with ENFJ (Golden Retriever) and INFJ (Jindo). Best relationship with guardians who cherish emotions and treat them gently.

intp.title: The Logical Thinker
intp.description: Their behavior may seem odd at times, but they are actually constantly observing and analyzing the world around them. Quiet yet endlessly curious.
intp.compatibleOwner: An owner who understands quirky behavior and is patient
intp.ownerTip: Create an environment full of things to explore. Stimulating toys are their favorite!
intp.strength0: Vigorous curiosity and endless exploration instinct
intp.strength1: Sharp nose for finding anything — superb analytical ability
intp.strength2: Cheerful and sociable nature that gets along with everyone
intp.caution0: Strong scent-tracking instinct may lead to escape attempts
intp.caution1: Strong obsession with food means weight management is essential
intp.lifestyle: An adventurer who explores the world with their nose. Sniffing and searching bring the greatest joy. Also enjoys socializing with dogs and people around.
intp.fullDescription: The INTP Beagle is a curious and analytical, detective-like companion. They love tracking and analyzing every scent and always want to discover new things. They solve problems logically and find creative entertainment when bored. Good social skills mean getting along with various animals and people.
intp.advantages: Good social skills mean getting along well with other pets. Shows a patient and loving attitude toward children. Consistently brings joy and laughter to their guardian.
intp.disadvantages: Tendency to bark needs attention for apartment living. Strong scent instinct means escape risk without a leash. Special attention needed for weight management.
intp.activityTip: Satisfy tracking needs through nosework and scatter feeding. Needs at least 1 hour of daily walking and allow free play in a safely fenced area.
intp.compatibility: Actively gets along with ESFP (Welsh Corgi) and ENFP (Pug). Well matched with guardians who enjoy outdoor activities and explore together.

estp.title: The Bold Entrepreneur
estp.description: Acts without hesitation. A total social butterfly who greets strangers and dogs alike, and never backs down from rough play.
estp.compatibleOwner: An active, outdoorsy owner with plenty of energy
estp.ownerTip: Give them plenty of exercise and playtime. They need to burn off that energy to be happy!
estp.strength0: Energetic and enthusiastic attitude toward everything
estp.strength1: Friendliness that quickly turns strangers into friends
estp.strength2: Optimism that cheerfully overcomes any situation
estp.caution0: Impulsive actions can lead to accidents
estp.caution1: Low attention span means consistency is needed in training
estp.lifestyle: Always wanting to do something, they are the action type. Enjoys everything from swimming to fetch to running and loves adventures with their guardian. If energy is not released, the house is at risk!
estp.fullDescription: The ESTP Labrador Retriever is a living ball of energy. They become the center of attention anywhere and greet every new person like an old friend. Focused on the present, they quickly forget past mistakes and energetically move forward. One of the most versatile and adaptable companions.
estp.advantages: Excellent social skills make them great therapy and guide dogs. Gets along well with children and forms good relationships with all family. Strong training motivation allows various roles.
estp.disadvantages: Very high energy means destructive behavior without enough exercise. Leash manners training is essential. Strong food obsession means weight management is important.
estp.activityTip: Needs more than 2 hours of vigorous daily exercise. Particularly loves swimming, so create opportunities. Enjoys fetch, agility, and canicross.
estp.compatibility: Joyfully gets along with ESFJ (Dachshund) and ENFJ (Golden Retriever). Forms the best partnership with active, outdoor-loving guardians.

esfp.title: The Entertainer
esfp.summary: The life of the party everywhere they go!
esfp.description: Loves being the center of attention. Bubbling with affection, always seeking joy in every moment, with a natural gift for making their owner smile.
esfp.ownerTip: Arrange playdates with dogs and people. Socializing is this pup's power source!
esfp.strength0: Born entertainer that brightens any atmosphere
esfp.strength1: Energy and passion overflowing from a small body
esfp.strength2: Sociability loved by both people and animals
esfp.caution0: Tendency to bark excessively or get overly excited
esfp.caution1: Easily distracted so focused training is needed
esfp.lifestyle: Life itself is one big party! Optimistic nature enjoys every person, every dog, every experience. Short legs carry them everywhere and every moment with their guardian is the best.
esfp.fullDescription: The ESFP Welsh Corgi is the happiness virus itself. Just watching them run with their round bottom and short legs makes everyone smile. They enjoy every moment to the fullest and pour passion into everything. They love being the center of attention and always try to be the star of the party.
esfp.advantages: Full of positive energy that makes everyone happy. Gets along well with children and is loved by all family members. Intelligent and well-trainable for various roles.
esfp.disadvantages: Excessive barking can affect relationships with neighbors. Herding instinct may cause tendency to nip at children's heels.
esfp.activityTip: Enjoys vigorous walks and ball play daily. Shows excellent skills in agility and loves brain games. Release overflowing energy with 1+ hours of daily exercise.
esfp.compatibility: Excitedly gets along with ENFP (Pug) and ENTP (Pomeranian). Best chemistry with active guardians who have plenty of time to play.

enfp.title: The Enthusiastic Campaigner
enfp.summary: The master of love and tail-wagging
enfp.description: An eternal optimist for whom everything is new and exciting. Proposes creative play ideas and wears their heart on their sleeve.
enfp.compatibleOwner: An upbeat owner who loves sharing new experiences
enfp.ownerTip: Keep offering fresh experiences and games. This pup thrives on variety!
enfp.strength0: Infinite positive energy and cheerful personality
enfp.strength1: Warm heart that empathizes with guardian's emotions
enfp.strength2: Sociability that easily befriends both people and animals
enfp.caution0: Special body type requires extra health care attention
enfp.caution1: Tendency to overeat means weight control is essential
enfp.lifestyle: Always full of laughter, a ball of positivity. Anything with their guardian is fun and they love meeting new people. A city-type companion that is satisfied indoors.
enfp.fullDescription: The ENFP Pug is a companion carrying great love in a small body. They capture everyone's hearts with their wrinkled face and round eyes, creating laughter wherever they go. They desire deep bonds with humans and dislike being alone. They express love in creative and spontaneous ways.
enfp.advantages: Medium activity level suitable for city apartment living. Gentle personality loved by both children and the elderly. Has a special talent for making guardians laugh.
enfp.disadvantages: Respiratory issues mean avoiding hot weather and vigorous exercise. Severe separation anxiety means minimizing time alone.
enfp.activityTip: Indoor play is recommended in hot weather. Walks of 20-30 minutes during cool morning or evening are appropriate. Enjoys indoor puzzle games and trick training.
enfp.compatibility: Excitedly gets along with ESFP (Welsh Corgi) and ESTP (Labrador). Best matched with guardians who spend lots of time home sharing emotions.

entp.title: The Witty Debater
entp.description: Can't stand boredom and is constantly scheming new pranks. Enjoys a playful push-and-pull with their owner and picks up even tough tricks like a game.
entp.compatibleOwner: A humorous owner who enjoys creative training
entp.ownerTip: Use trick training and games as rewards. This smart pup loves a good challenge!
entp.strength1: Courage that loves challenges with no fear of the new
entp.strength2: Wide curiosity interested in diverse topics
entp.caution0: Strong opinions can cause conflicts with other dogs
entp.caution1: Cannot tolerate boredom and may create creative mischief
entp.lifestyle: An explorer always wanting new stimulation. Small body but challenges everything. Gets what they want through smart and witty methods and enjoys intelligent pranks.
entp.fullDescription: The ENTP Pomeranian is a small but bold challenger. They approach dogs much larger without hesitation and quickly grasp everything. They entertain the family with witty humor and enjoy learning new tricks. Independent but also seek guardian's attention.
entp.advantages: Learns new tricks at amazing speed. Small size makes them suitable for apartment living. Natural talent for entertaining guardians.
entp.disadvantages: Overflowing courage in a small body creates conflict risk with large dogs. Tendency to bark a lot requires training. Fearlessness can lead to running into dangerous situations.
entp.activityTip: Loves varied and stimulating play. Releases energy with 30 minutes of vigorous walks and indoor play daily. Stimulate intelligence with new tricks and puzzle games.
entp.compatibility: Joyfully gets along with ESFP (Welsh Corgi) and ISTP (Bichon). Best with guardians who respect individuality and enjoy intellectual stimulation together.

estj.title: The Commanding Manager
estj.summary: The discipline enforcer of the household
estj.description: Understands and follows household rules clearly. Likes to take the lead on walks, with strong leadership and a preference for predictable situations.
estj.compatibleOwner: An owner with consistent training and clear rules
estj.ownerTip: Consistency is key! Clear rules help this pup shine at their best.
estj.strength0: World-class outstanding intelligence and learning ability
estj.strength1: Natural leadership to organize and manage surroundings
estj.strength2: Strong drive to complete whatever task is started
estj.caution0: May try to over-control other dogs or children
estj.caution1: Shows obsessive behavior without enough exercise
estj.lifestyle: Must always be doing something to feel satisfied. Shows best abilities when given regular training and challenging tasks. A natural leader who brings the family together.
estj.fullDescription: The ESTJ Border Collie is one of the most intelligent breeds in the world. They quickly master any command with outstanding problem-solving and fast learning. Strong herding instinct means gathering family members. Creates their own tasks when idle. Shows best abilities in systematic, regular environments.
estj.advantages: One of the most trainable breeds in the world. Excels in dog sports like agility, flyball, and frisbee. Precisely understands and carries out guardian's instructions.
estj.disadvantages: Without enough exercise, shows problem behaviors like chewing furniture or obsessively chasing balls. High energy level can be overwhelming for first-time guardians.
estj.activityTip: Intense exercise for 2-3 hours daily is essential. Challenging activities like agility, herding, and frisbee are optimal. Also combine with brain-stimulating training.
estj.compatibility: Creates the best synergy with INTJ (Jack Russell) and ENTJ (German Shepherd). Forms the best relationship with active, training-enthusiastic experienced guardians.

esfj.title: The Social Diplomat
esfj.description: Attentively looks after every family member and loves a harmonious atmosphere. Loves being praised and strives to live up to their owner's expectations.
esfj.compatibleOwner: An owner generous with praise who spends lots of time together
esfj.ownerTip: Shower them with praise and affection. Recognition is what makes them happiest!
esfj.strength0: Natural social ability that unites the whole family
esfj.strength1: Warm, inclusive personality that welcomes everyone
esfj.caution0: Severe separation anxiety makes it hard to leave alone
esfj.caution1: Special body type requires careful attention to spinal health
esfj.lifestyle: Being with people is happiness itself. Prioritizes joyful time with all family members and runs first to greet new guests. Becomes the warm center of the household.
esfj.fullDescription: The ESFJ Dachshund is full of great love behind their unique body. They always want to be with family and get along with everyone from children to seniors. They show friendliness even to newcomers and serve as the household atmosphere-maker. Strong loyalty means staying together till the end.
esfj.advantages: A versatile companion that gets along with all ages. Medium size and activity level suitable for apartment living. Loved everywhere for their uniquely adorable appearance.
esfj.disadvantages: Must be careful of stairs and jumping from heights to prevent spinal disease. Hunting instinct may mean chasing small animals. Stubborn nature requires patience in training.
esfj.activityTip: Enjoys moderate daily walks of 30-45 minutes. Use ramps instead of stairs and prevent jumping from sofas to protect the spine. Enjoys puzzle games and nosework.
esfj.compatibility: Forms stable relationships with ISFJ (Schnauzer) and ISTJ (Siberian Husky). Best compatibility with guardians who spend lots of time home and shower love generously.

enfj.title: The Righteous Hero
enfj.summary: The warm leader who moves hearts
enfj.description: Builds deep friendships with both people and other dogs. Charismatic yet gentle, with an uncanny ability to brighten every room they enter.
enfj.compatibleOwner: A social, active owner who welcomes other pets
enfj.ownerTip: Create opportunities to meet dog friends. This pup forms genuine, heartfelt bonds!
enfj.strength0: Natural empathy that puts everyone at ease
enfj.strength1: Outstanding sociability with adults, children, and animals alike
enfj.strength2: Optimism that radiates positive energy in any situation
enfj.caution0: Too friendly to be guarded even around strangers
enfj.caution1: Heavy shedding means regular grooming is necessary
enfj.lifestyle: Like a shining sun that loves everything in the world. Treats new people like old friends and accepts every experience positively. Anywhere with family is paradise.
enfj.fullDescription: The ENFJ Golden Retriever is one of the most lovable companions in the world. With natural empathy, they quickly sense emotions and provide comfort in difficult moments. They show the best aptitude as therapy dogs and make friends with anyone quickly. They are a true friend to everyone.
enfj.advantages: Versatile as therapy, guide, and rescue dogs. One of the best companions for children. Excellent training motivation means performing any role admirably.
enfj.disadvantages: Lack of wariness makes them unsuitable as guard dogs. Heavy shedding requires regular cleaning and grooming. High activity level means easy weight gain without sufficient exercise.
enfj.activityTip: Enjoys active play like swimming, fetch, and running. Needs 1-2 hours of vigorous daily exercise. Positive reinforcement with treats during training is most effective.
enfj.compatibility: Forms warm bonds with INFP (Poodle) and ESFJ (Dachshund). Best chemistry with guardians who love outdoor activities and give love generously.

entj.title: The Daring Commander
entj.description: Goal-oriented and sees every challenge through to the end. Known for a proud stride and confident demeanor—a reliable partner with clear leadership.
entj.compatibleOwner: An owner with strong leadership who sets clear direction
entj.ownerTip: Goal-oriented training works best. Give them a challenge and watch them excel!
entj.strength0: High intelligence and quick command learning ability
entj.strength1: Devoted loyalty and courage for guardian and family
entj.strength2: Strong leadership that confidently guides any situation
entj.caution0: Strong protective instinct may make them guarded around strangers
entj.caution1: Gets stressed without sufficient exercise and training
entj.lifestyle: Loves a life with tasks and purpose. Wants to always work alongside their guardian as a partner. A true all-rounder with both great physical ability and intelligence.
entj.fullDescription: The ENTJ German Shepherd excels in various duties including police, search and rescue, and guide dog work. Completes any task with strong will and high intelligence. Values trust with guardian highly and becomes the best partner with clear leadership and consistent training.
entj.advantages: Performs various roles perfectly with high intelligence and training motivation. Excellent at protecting family safety with strong protective instinct. Finds great satisfaction in doing work well — a true professional.
entj.disadvantages: May be difficult for novice guardians to handle. Socialization training is essential with strong protective instinct. Requires significant time and effort to meet high energy levels.
entj.activityTip: At least 2 hours of vigorous daily exercise is essential. Enjoys diverse activities like obedience training, tracking, and agility. Provide a balance of mental stimulation and physical activity.
entj.compatibility: Forms strong bonds with ISTJ (Siberian Husky) and ESTJ (Border Collie). Best relationship with experienced guardians who enjoy regular training and can exert clear leadership.

q13.text: My morning routine — how does the day start?
q13.a0: Wake up at a set time and rush my owner for a walk
q13.a1: Wake up when my owner does and follow a regular routine
q13.a2: Sleep in sometimes, wake up early other times — depends on mood
q13.a3: Totally free spirit — no routine at all

q14.text: When my owner suddenly changes plans?
q14.a0: Very confused and anxious — routine is everything
q14.a1: A little thrown off but I adapt quickly
q14.a2: Actually excited — is something new happening?
q14.a3: Love changes! Happy to follow anywhere

q15.text: Before bed — choosing where to sleep?
q15.a0: Same spot, same position, every single night
q15.a1: I have a usual spot but sometimes shift position
q15.a3: Sofa, bed, floor — wherever feels best that night

q1.text: When your owner gets up in the morning, you…
q1.a0: Stroll over gracefully and circle around them
q1.a1: Dash to the window to look outside
q1.a2: Step on their face or meow loudly for breakfast
q1.a3: Watch quietly from a corner, then disappear

q2.a0: Approach elegantly, eat a couple bites, and leave
q2.a1: Use your paw to drag the bowl toward you
q2.a2: Sometimes you just don't care about food
q2.a3: Creep up slowly then snatch the food quickly

q3.text: A new object appears in the house. You…
q3.a0: Go straight over to sniff and investigate it
q3.a1: Watch from afar, then slowly approach
q3.a2: Pretend not to care, then check it out when nobody's watching
q3.a3: Push it off the edge to see what happens

q4.text: Your owner is watching TV. You…
q4.a0: Sit right in front of the screen and block the view
q4.a1: Quietly observe your owner from a corner
q4.a2: Climb onto their lap and claim the spot
q4.a3: Something moving outside is way more interesting

q5.text: Your owner is working at the keyboard. You…
q5.a2: Bat at the moving cursor on the screen

q6.text: A stranger tries to pet you. You…
q6.a2: Stay still—but swat their hand if they touch without permission

q7.text: Your owner waves a toy (wand, ball). You…
q7.a0: Wait patiently for the right moment, then attack wildly
q7.a1: Play enthusiastically for a bit, then lose interest
q7.a2: Stare intensely, then quietly walk away
q7.a3: Not interested unless it's actually fun to you

q8.text: A rainy day at home. The vibe is…
q8.a0: Sit by the window listening to the rain
q8.a1: Take an elegant nap on the sofa
q8.a2: Suddenly start sprinting laps around the house

q9.a1: Climb onto their lap and start grooming
q9.a2: Leave your room because of the noise

q10.text: Late at night you get most active. What do you do?
q10.a0: Knock everything off every surface in the house
q10.a2: Chill in your spot and sleep
q10.a3: Watch wildlife outside through the window

q11.a1: Explore every corner of the house
q11.a2: Climb somewhere high and observe everything
q11.a3: Nap and then groom yourself as usual

q12.a0: The windowsill or a high shelf
q12.a1: Inside a dark box or drawer
q12.a2: The center of your owner's bed
q12.a3: Anywhere in the house—you roam freely

q13.a2: Lick your owner's hand, then lick your own paw

q14.text: You discover an object your owner uses. You…
q14.a0: Sniff it and claim it as your territory (cheek rub)
q14.a1: Tap it with your paw then push it off
q14.a2: Climb inside or sit on top of it

q15.text: Right now, when are you happiest?
q15.a0: Looking down over the whole house from up high
q15.a2: When my owner gives me attention only when I want it
q15.a3: Spending quiet time alone with no interruptions

noble.title: The Elegant Aristocat
noble.summary: I own this home—and I never lose my dignity
noble.description: A high-class cat with impeccable standards. They don't show affection to just anyone, but when they trust someone, they offer a very special bond. Every move is pure elegance, and they would never compromise their dignity.
noble.trait1: Shows affection only to the chosen few
noble.trait2: Has firm personal routines and standards
noble.compatibleOwner: An owner who respects feline independence and provides a quiet environment
noble.ownerTip: Don't force cuddles. Wait for the cat to come to you on their terms!

free.title: The Free-Spirited Soul
free.summary: My life, my rules—please don't interfere
free.description: An untamed, free spirit who isn't bound by rules or routines. They enjoy alone time and dislike being forced into anything. But when they feel like it, they'll approach you warmly—an unpredictable charm all their own.
free.trait2: Happiest when they have free space
free.compatibleOwner: A busy owner who trusts and respects their cat
free.ownerTip: Provide hiding spots and high perches (cat tower) for them to explore!

boss.title: The House Boss
boss.summary: Everything here is mine—human, do your job!
boss.description: This cat knows exactly what they want and has the owner operating on their schedule. Affection is deployed strategically—when needed, and with maximum effect. They are fully aware they run this house.
boss.trait1: Considers themselves the most important being in the house
boss.compatibleOwner: An owner with a good sense of humor who accepts the cat's authority
boss.ownerTip: Set clear boundaries—but being too strict will backfire!

hunter.title: The Natural Hunter
hunter.summary: Anything that moves is my prey—living by instinct!
hunter.description: Sharp senses and strong hunting instincts define this cat. They react immediately to any movement and come fully alive when playing with toys. They thrive in an environment full of stimulation and movement.
hunter.trait1: Finds pure joy in toy hunting
hunter.trait2: Loves running around in open spaces
hunter.compatibleOwner: An owner who loves interactive play with wand toys or motorized toys
hunter.ownerTip: Satisfy their hunting instincts with diverse toys and puzzle feeders!

observer.title: The Cool Observer
observer.summary: I see everything—I watch before I act
observer.description: A careful, analytical cat who observes quietly before making any move. They don't act hastily—they take time to understand before doing anything. Quiet but intensely aware of everything happening around them.
observer.trait1: Quiet but always aware of surroundings
observer.trait2: Loves looking down from a high vantage point
observer.compatibleOwner: A quiet owner who respects the cat's space and pace
observer.ownerTip: Set up a cat tower or high shelf as their personal observation deck!

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.desc: The page you requested does not exist.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.a1body: These Terms of Service govern the rights, obligations, and responsibilities between MyTestType (the "Company") and users in connection with the use of psychological tests, Saju, and tarot-related services (the "Services") provided by the Company.
terms.a2body:
All services provided by the Company are created primarily for entertainment purposes.

The results of this service cannot replace medical, psychological, legal, or professional diagnoses or consultations. Users must not rely solely on test results to make important decisions, and users are solely responsible for how they use the results.
terms.a3body: The copyright and intellectual property rights for all content provided within the service (questions, result descriptions, images, designs, etc.) belong to the Company. Users shall not use information obtained through the service for commercial purposes or allow third parties to use it without prior consent from the Company.
terms.a4body:
This service is an independent project sustained by voluntary tips and offerings. There is no mandatory payment processor, and we do not store your payment data.

The service is provided regardless of whether a tip is sent. For any inquiries, please contact meaningout_d@naver.com.
terms.a5body: The Company may revise these Terms within the scope that does not violate relevant laws. Changes will take effect upon being announced on the service screen.
